name: swift-sim-companion
description: Teach Codex to set up Swift Sim, manage signed iPhone app histories, and optionally preview Mac-hosted Xcode Simulators.

interface.shortDescription: Manage iPhone prototypes and preview simulators.
interface.longDescription: A setup-aware Codex workflow that installs signed real-device apps over an account-free temporary link, organizes updates into one app history, verifies reachable device installs, and optionally previews a Mac-hosted Simulator.
defaultPrompt: Build this app to my iPhone with Swift Sim.
Update the app on my iPhone without losing its data.
Open a quick live Simulator preview in Swift Sim.
